title: Thibaan × BNK48
original_title: ไทบ้าน x BNK48 จากใจผู้สาวคนนี้
overview: In order to come up with new music, a girl music group has to go to live in the countryside. By putting aside their city lives, perhaps life in the countryside can prove inspirational and help the girl band to produce a fresh, new sound.
